notes.composition_source: LNP67/95/108 from Supp Fig 7 (HIGH). All others: HL+PEG from Supp Fig 1a grid (HIGH), molar ratios unknown (row-to-ratio mapping is not sequential).
notes.delivery_source: Supp Fig 6b bar charts, MEDIUM confidence (±1-2 normalized BC counts)
notes.numbering_caveat: LNP IDs follow (col-1)*8+row pattern in Supp Fig 1a, but the row index does NOT correspond to the ratio number 1-8 as listed in the composition table. The mapping is shuffled or non-sequential.
